title: CanadaCiecChangeNotificationDetailsV1
description:
`details` payload of one Material Change record (regime doc ¬ß5): every
interest field PLUS the notice's change date.

client_id.description:
Source person GUID from the client link ‚Äî the ¬ß2.4 resolution audit
trail (real politician id resolves from the roster in pool-backed runs).

client_title.description: Card-header `¬∑ {title}` suffix, middot-stripped; null when absent.

date_of_change.description:
`Date of change: YYYY/MM/DD` from the item text, normalized to ISO
`YYYY-MM-DD`; null when the line is missing/unparseable (fail-soft ‚Äî
the raw line survives in `asset_description_raw`, regime doc ¬ß3.7).

declaration_id.description:
Source declaration GUID (lowercase) ‚Äî threaded from the fetch URL;
families A/B never print it in-page (regime doc ¬ß4).

declaration_type_raw.description:
`Declaration type` cell verbatim (`Gifts (Code)`, `Disclosure
Summaries (Code)`, ‚Ä¶) ‚Äî the ¬ß3.1 census key.

fields.description:
Family-A/A‚Ä≤ payload `<dl>` pairs verbatim (`{dt: dd-text}`), an open
vocabulary; `{}` for families B/C (regime doc ¬ß4).

gift_received_date.description:
Family-A `Gift received date` verbatim (`YYYY-MM-DD`); null when absent
(nullable, regime doc ¬ß3.4/¬ß3.7). Never promoted to `transaction_date`.

gift_source.description: Family-A `Source` cell verbatim (query-hot copy; also in `fields`).

item_id.description:
Family-C per-item GUID verbatim (UPPERCASE as printed); null for the
flat families A/A‚Ä≤/B.

language.description: Ingestion language: always `en` in v1 (regime doc ¬ß3.9).

law.description:
Legal instrument, derived from the `Regime` cell: `act` for the
Conflict of Interest Act, `code` for the Members' Code (regime doc
¬ß3.10 check 2 guarantees the binary).

no_longer_applicable.description:
`No Longer Applicable` (`bg-warning`) badge present at fetch time
(regime doc ¬ß3.8 ‚Äî status flips mutate the same URL's bytes).

ociec_translation.description:
`OCIEC Translation` (`bg-info`) badge present ‚Äî the displayed text is
office-translated (regime doc ¬ß3.9 provenance).

row_ordinal.description:
1-based row position in document order (always 1 for families A/A‚Ä≤/B;
one per `ciec-declaration-disclosureitem` for family C).

section_label.description:
Family-C section label verbatim (case + any `[‚Ä¶]` statute-ref suffix
intact); null otherwise.

travel_end.description: Travel range end parsed from `Dates`; null on parse failure.

travel_start.description:
Travel range start parsed from `Dates` (`YYYY-MM-DD`); null when the
range does not parse (fail-soft ‚Äî raw survives in `travel_dates_raw`).
